title: taraxacum macrocarpum
intro: Taraxacum macrocarpum, also known as the large-flowered dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, primarily used to treat digestive issues, skin problems, and liver disorders. The plant's roots and leaves contain compounds with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing cholesterol levels, improving liver function, and promoting digestive health. Taraxacum macrocarpum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as dried and used as a supplement or added to salads and other dishes.
